title: マイルCS南部杯の後に・迷うからこそ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an intense showdown, the crowd erupts into
a thunderous ovation, warmly celebrating Hokko
Tarumae's return.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She and Copano Rickey begin talking about their
next race, and they pressure me to hurry and
decide where it should be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wonder Acute also speaks up, stating her desire
to join them. All three agree to set their next goal
as the JBC Classic.
